_doc: Configuration for EndProductPublishView.composeRequestFromProduct. Move-rule-from-Swift content. Iterate freely; takes effect on next refreshMchataisourceCache.

llm_picker._doc: Backend ladder for the LLM symbol picker. Tried in order; first available wins. The user's CloudProvider.getActive() is auto-prepended at runtime so the user's chosen provider gets first dibs. 'foundation' is Apple Intelligence (always available on supported devices, free, on-device). Set llm_picker.enabled=false to bypass the LLM and use the deterministic fallback below.

style_pools_by_category._doc: Style preset pool per category. The picker selects one preset from the pool seeded by the app's name+summary so the same app always lands on the same preset.

deterministic_fallback._doc: Used when llm_picker.enabled=false OR every backend in the ladder fails. Pure keyword match against name+summary, first hit wins. Generic apps fall through to a seeded random pick from generic_pool. Keep this list TINY â€” the LLM picker is the real solution; this is just a last-ditch safety net so the icon is never blank.
